introSection: HuriHuri is a steel spinning roller coaster located at TusenFryd in Vinterbro, Akershus, Norway. Built by Zamperla, it opened on 7 May 2022.
fullText: HuriHuri is a steel spinning roller coaster located at TusenFryd in Vinterbro, Akershus, Norway. Built by Zamperla, it opened on 7 May 2022.
